info.name: Meet-Rub API Collection v2
info.description: Complete and accurate API collection for Meet-Rub platform. Base URL: http://localhost:7000/api/v1

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: OTP-based registration, login, logout, and token refresh

request.description:
Send OTP to user's email.

**type**: `email-verification` | `password-reset`

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "status": "success", "message": "Verification code sent successfully." }
```

formdata.description: JSON string. serviceOffred (note spelling), govIdType: aadhar | pan | passport

request.description:
Verify OTP and complete freelancer registration. Sets httpOnly auth cookies.

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "message": "Login successful", "tokensCookieSet": true }
```

Verify OTP and complete creator registration. Sets httpOnly auth cookies.

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "message": "Login successful", "tokensCookieSet": true }
```

Login with email and password.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "message": "Login successful",
  "tokensCookieSet": true,
  "userInfo": {
    "user_id": 1,
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "name": "John Doe",
    "role": "freelancer",
    "roleWiseId": 5
  }
}
```

Refresh access token using refresh token from cookies.

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "message": "Access token refreshed" }
```
Logout and clear auth cookies. Requires authentication.

item.name: 2. User Profile
item.description: User profile management - auth required for all endpoints

request.description:
Get user profile data by type.

**Freelancer basicInfo response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "first_name": "John",
    "last_name": "Doe",
    "full_name": "John Doe",
    "date_of_birth": "1990-01-01",
    "phone_number": "+91...",
    "profile_title": "Web Developer",
    "freelancer_thumbnail_image": "<presigned_url>",
    "email": "...",
    "joined_at": "..."
  }
}
```

**Creator basicInfo response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "first_name": "Jane",
    "last_name": "Smith",
    "full_name": "Jane Smith",
    "phone_number": "+91...",
    "email": "...",
    "social_links": [],
    "niche": [],
    "joined_at": "..."
  }
}
```
Get bank account details (Freelancer only).
Update freelancer's basic profile information.
Update creator's basic profile information.
Update profile picture.
Update bank account details for payout (Freelancer only).
Update government ID document (Freelancer only).

item.name: 3. Freelancer
item.description: Freelancer endpoints. Public routes need no auth; protected routes require Freelancer role.

request.description: List all freelancers with pagination. Public endpoint.
Get detailed profile of a specific freelancer. Public.
Get portfolio items of a freelancer. Public.
Get before/after impact data of a freelancer. Public.

Get all platform-defined service types. Public.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Services fetched successfully",
  "data": ["Web Development", "Video Editing", ...]
}
```
Get all service niches/categories. Public.

formdata.value: Full stack web development with React and Node.js.

request.description:
Add a new service offering. Uses form-data. (Freelancer role required)

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Service added successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "freelancer_id": 5,
    "service_name": "Web Development",
    "service_description": "...",
    "service_price": 5000,
    "delivery_time": "5-7 days",
    "plan_type": "basic",
    "thumbnail_file": "<presigned_url>",
    "created_at": "...",
    "updated_at": "..."
  }
}
```

formdata.value: Full stack web development with React, Node.js, and AWS.

request.description: Update an existing service. Uses form-data. (Freelancer role required)
Delete a service by query param. (Freelancer role required)

formdata.value: E-commerce website with payment gateway integration

formdata.description: Required: Portfolio item ID to update
Optional: Existing file URL - if provided, skips new upload
Optional: New file to replace existing

request.description: Update an existing portfolio item. itemId is required. Provide either `url` (existing) or `file` (new upload).
Delete a portfolio item by query param `portfolioItemId`. Also removes file from storage.
Delete a specific portfolio entry by query param `itemId`. (Freelancer role required)

query.description: Optional: filter by service type. Without this, returns grouped by service type.

request.description:
Get before/after impact items.

**Without serviceType:** Returns grouped by service type.
**With serviceType:** Returns paginated list with pagination metadata.

**Response 200 (with serviceType):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": [...],
  "pagination": {
    "total": 20,
    "totalPages": 2,
    "currentPage": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "hasNext": true,
    "hasPrevious": false
  }
}
```

formdata.value: Increased engagement by 200% with professional editing

request.description:
Upload before/after images to showcase impact. (Freelancer role required)

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Before/After uploaded successfully",
  "data": {
    "impact_id": 1,
    "freelancer_id": 5,
    "service_type": "Video Editing",
    "before_service_public_url": "<presigned_url>",
    "after_service_public_url": "<presigned_url>",
    "impact_metric": "Increased engagement by 200%",
    "created_at": "..."
  }
}
```

query.description: Required: Impact ID (query param, NOT request body)

request.description: Delete before/after images by query param `id`. (Freelancer role required)

Get comprehensive earnings summary. (Freelancer role required)

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "completed_earnings": { "count": 5, "total": 25000 },
  "pending_release": { "count": 2, "total": 10000 },
  "processing": { "count": 1, "total": 5000 },
  "total_lifetime_earnings": 40000
}
```

Get all payouts with status and transaction details. (Freelancer role required)

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "count": 3,
  "payouts": [...]
}
```
Get profile completion percentage. (Freelancer role required)

Raise a dispute against a creator. (Freelancer role required)

**Body fields:**
- `project_id` (number, required)
- `reason_of_dispute` (string, required)
- `description` (string, optional)

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Dispute raised successfully",
  "data": {
    "dispute_id": 1,
    "project_id": 10,
    "creator_id": 3,
    "freelancer_id": 7
  }
}
```

item.name: 4. Creator
item.description: Creator-specific endpoints (Creator role required unless marked)

request.description: Post a new service request for freelancers to bid on. (Creator role required)
Get all service requests created by the authenticated creator.

Get all freelancers saved to the wishlist.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Wishlist freelancers fetched successfully",
  "data": [...]
}
```
Add a freelancer to the wishlist. Body field: `freelancer_id`.
Remove a freelancer from the wishlist. Body field: `freelancer_id`.
View a specific freelancer's full profile details.
Get all available service niches/categories.

Raise a dispute against a freelancer. (Creator role required)

**Body fields:**
- `project_id` (number, required)
- `reason_of_dispute` (string, required)
- `description` (string, optional)

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Dispute raised successfully",
  "data": {
    "dispute_id": 2,
    "project_id": 10,
    "creator_id": 3,
    "freelancer_id": 7
  }
}
```
List disputes for the authenticated creator.

item.name: 5. Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints (Admin role required for all)

request.description:
Approve a user profile for platform access.

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "status": "success", "message": "user approval successful" }
```
Suspend a freelancer account.
Get details of a specific creator account.
List all freelancer accounts with pagination.
Get details of a specific freelancer account.
Get freelancers eligible to be suggested/recommended to creators.

Assign one or more freelancers to a creator's service request.

**Body fields:**
- `requestId` (string/number, required) — service request ID
- `freelancerIds` (array of numbers, required) — one or more freelancer IDs
- `adminNotes` (string, optional) — notes visible to the creator

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Freelancers assigned to service request successfully",
  "data": { "request_id": "1", "freelancer_id": [5, 8], "admin_notes": "..." }
}
```
List all freelancers with pending KYC verification.
Approve a freelancer's KYC. `freelancer_id` is a route param.
Reject a freelancer's KYC application with a reason.

Get all service types. Optional search by name.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Services fetched successfully",
  "data": ["Web Development", "Video Editing", ...]
}
```

Add new service types. Body field: `serviceType` (array).

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Services added successfully",
  "data": [...]
}
```
List all service niches/categories on the platform.

Create new niches. Body field: `nicheType` (array) — NOT `niches`.

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Niches added successfully",
  "data": [...]
}
```

Get all escrow transactions.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "count": 5,
  "transactions": [...]
}
```

Release escrow payment to freelancer after project completion.

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "message": "Payment released successfully. Payout initiated." }
```

Get all freelancer payouts with optional status filter.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "count": 10,
  "payouts": [...]
}
```
Get detailed information about a specific payout.

Update platform commission percentage (0–100).

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "message": "Commission percentage updated successfully",
  "new_percentage": 10
}
```

item.name: 6. Projects
item.description: Project management. Auth required for all.

request.description:
Create a new project with a freelancer.

**Body fields:**
- `freelancer_id` (number, required)
- `service_id` (number, required) — the specific service being hired for
- `number_of_units` (number, required)
- `amount` (number, required) — must be > 0
- `project_end_date` (string, required) — ISO date

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "message": "Project created successfully",
  "project_id": 10,
  "amount": 5000
}
```

Get all projects for the authenticated user (as creator or freelancer).

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Projects fetched successfully",
  "count": 3,
  "projects": [...]
}
```
List all projects. Public endpoint.

Update project status.

**`status` values:** `CREATED` | `IN_PROGRESS` | `COMPLETED` | `CANCELLED`

Freelancer can mark `COMPLETED`; creator can `CANCEL`.
Delete a project. Only allowed if no transactions exist.

item.name: 7. Payments
item.description: Payment processing with Razorpay and escrow. Creator role required.

request.description:
Verify Razorpay payment signature and hold funds in escrow.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "message": "Payment verified. Funds held in escrow.",
  "transaction_id": "txn_xyz"
}
```
Get all payment transactions for the authenticated user.
Get details of a specific payment transaction.

item.name: 8. Wallet
item.description: Wallet management for loading funds and tracking transactions. Auth required.

request.description:
Get current wallet balance.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "balance": 5000,
  "currency": "INR",
  "status": "ACTIVE"
}
```

Create a Razorpay order to add funds to wallet.

**amount:** Min 100, Max 100000 (INR)

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "message": "Order created successfully",
  "order": {
    "id": "order_...",
    "amount": 500000,
    "currency": "INR",
    "key": "rzp_test_..."
  }
}
```

Verify Razorpay payment and credit amount to wallet.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "message": "Wallet loaded successfully",
  "amount": 5000
}
```
Get details of a specific wallet transaction by ID.

item.name: 9. Webhooks
item.description: Webhook endpoints for payment gateway callbacks. No auth required.

request.description:
Razorpay webhook endpoint. Signature verified via `X-Razorpay-Signature` header.

**Handled events:** `payment.captured`, `payment.failed`, `payout.processed`, `payout.failed`, `payout.reversed`

**Response 200:**
```json
{ "status": "ok" }
```

Check if a username is available for registration.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "available": true
}
```

Submit a contact form message to the admin team.

**Body fields:** `email` (required), `subject` (required), `message` (required)
Check if the server is running and healthy.
